good.human_notes: Correctly states 2 bedrooms for 4 guests, Barcelona location, workspace, elevator, balcony. No invented distances or renovation claims.
good.hero_headline: Light-Filled Two-Bedroom in the Heart of the Eixample
highlights: Dedicated workspace with fast Wi-Fi — ideal for remote work
Elevator access, balcony, and air conditioning throughout
Quiet Eixample stretch, close to metro and restaurants
good.about_this_place: This second-floor loft sits on a quiet stretch of the Eixample, a short walk from Passeig de Gràcia. High ceilings and tall windows fill the two bedrooms and open living space with natural light. A dedicated workspace makes it well-suited for remote work, and the elevator means luggage is no problem. There is a balcony, air conditioning, and a well-equipped kitchen. Check-in from 3 PM, check-out 11 AM.

bad.human_notes: Claims 'recently renovated in 2024' (not in data), '5-minute walk to Sagrada Família' (distance not stated), and 'panoramic city views' (balcony only).
intentional_failures: 'recently renovated in 2024' — no renovation mentioned in data
'5-minute walk to Sagrada Família' — proximity mentioned but no distance given
'panoramic city views from the balcony' — data only says balcony, no view qualifier
bad.hero_headline: Newly Renovated Eixample Loft with Panoramic Views
highlights: Just renovated in 2024 with premium finishes throughout
5-minute walk to the Sagrada Família and top Barcelona attractions
Panoramic city views from the private balcony
Dedicated workspace with gigabit Wi-Fi for remote workers
bad.about_this_place: This beautifully renovated 2024 loft sits at the epicentre of Barcelona's Eixample, just a 5-minute stroll from the Sagrada Família. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame panoramic views over the city's famous grid, while the freshly redesigned interior blends Catalan heritage with contemporary comfort. Two bedrooms sleep four guests, a dedicated workspace serves remote professionals, and the elevator means arriving with luggage is effortless.
